title: Fully coupled mean-field FBSDEs with jumps and related optimal control problems
abstract: This paper study a type of fully coupled mean-field forward-backward stochastic differential equations with jumps under the monotonicity condition, including the existence and the uniqueness of the solution of our equation as well as the continuity property of the solutions with respect to the parameters. Then we establish the stochastic maximum principle for the corresponding optimal control problems and give the applications to mean-variance portfolio problems and linear-quadratic problems, respectively.
